message:
feat(mvcc): MPC commit controller + Stackelberg scheduler primitives (IMPL-26/27)

1-step LQR closed-form MPC (simple but correct for the queue-depth
target) + weighted-shortest-processing-time heuristic for the
Stackelberg coordinator. No wiring into actual commit paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
